enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Hasili Fisiliye?

The song conveys a playful and romantic vibe, celebrating the joy and excitement of love.

In which movie is Hasili Fisiliye featured?

The song is featured in the movie Aadhavan.

Who are the singers of Hasili Fisiliye?

The song is sung by Dr Burn, Harini, Karthik, and Maya.

Who composed the music for Hasili Fisiliye?

The music for the song was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was Hasili Fisiliye released?

The song was released on August 20, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Hasili Fisiliye, the characters express their feelings of love and joy through playful and catchy lyrics. The upbeat tempo and lively vocals create an atmosphere of celebration, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The song encapsulates the excitement of falling in love, evoking feelings of happiness and nostalgia. Overall, it serves as a delightful anthem for lovebirds and party-goers alike.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Hasili Fisiliye from the movie Aadhavan is a vibrant celebration of love, featuring an electrifying collaboration between talented singers Dr Burn, Harini, Karthik, and Maya. The upbeat melody composed by Harrish Jeyaraj perfectly complements the playful lyrics by Pa Vijay, creating an infectious energy that captures the essence of romance. This song is sure to make your heart dance and is perfect for any joyous occasion!
stanzaMeanings: Darling, my heart is freezing, oh, love is really amazing. Excuse me, let me tell you something. If you smile, the iPhone rings. When I speak, the words fall on me. Will love come and take care of me? If it protects me, I will live happily.
Hassily Fisiliye, my jewel, in your smile, I find joy. In my dreams, in my dreams, I will give you everything...
In my heart and yours, there is a connection. In my heart, in my heart, there is a new rhythm...
Oh Anjana, oh Anjana, with a little sweetness... you are my everything.
Hassily Fisiliye, my jewel, in your smile, I find joy. In my dreams, in my dreams, I will give you everything...
In my heart and yours, there is a connection. In my heart, in my heart, there is a new rhythm...
In the world, in the world, with life, there is a desire. Without this and that, the sound will come from the silence. In this world, who will take you? Will you be the one to guide me?
You have taken me away, oh, I am yours. In the flowers, there is a connection. You are a little bit of sweetness, you are a little bit of joy.
With life, with life, you are holding me tight. With your fingers, you are mixing me in everything. Who will separate us in this world? In the end, we will be together, singing our song.
You are half of my dress, you are the beauty of my life. You are the earth that holds me, you are my treasure, my sky.
Hassily Fisiliye, my jewel, in your smile, I find joy. In my dreams, in my dreams, I will give you everything...
In my heart and yours, there is a connection. In my heart, in my heart, there is a new rhythm...
Oh Anjana, oh Anjana, with a little sweetness... you are my everything.
